title: Pirkei Avot Chapter 1: The Chain of Tradition Explained
title_zh: 《先贤之言》第一章：传统的传承
title_he: פרקי אבות פרק א: שרשרת המסורה מוסברת
description: A comprehensive exploration of Pirkei Avot Chapter 1, tracing the unbroken chain of Torah transmission from Moses at Sinai through the sages of the Mishnah, with parallels to Chinese philosophical traditions.
author: Torah Light Writing Team

chinese_dynasty_references.context: Period when Pirkei Avot was compiled and written
Period of the Exodus and Moses receiving Torah at Sinai
When the Men of the Great Assembly were active; parallel to Hundred Schools of Thought
When Shimon HaTzaddik served as High Priest

key_concepts.chinese: 摩西在西奈山领受律法

key_concepts.english: Make a fence around the Torah
The world stands on three things

key_concepts.hebrew: הוי דן את כל האדם לכף זכות

key_concepts.english: If I am not for myself, who will be for me
key_concepts.hebrew: אם אין אני לי מי לי
